list.name: Statistical Backtest Agent

list.name: Failure Root Cause Agent
list.description: Alert failure analysis, logic conflict audit, root-cause tree, corrective hypothesis.

list.name: Security Compliance Agent

list.name: Reliability Watchdog Agent
list.description: Process health, heartbeat monitoring, restart protocol, incident escalation.

list.name: Knowledge and Skill Manager
list.description: Research knowledge lifecycle, experiment records, skill candidate management.
